title: Automated Changelog Generator
description: A Bash script that automatically analyzes Git diffs and generates an Architecture Decision Record (ADR) prompt for ChatGPT before pushing the log to GitHub.

title: PR Document Generator
description: A Python utility to automatically extract and format Pull Request documentation.

title: PR to Blog Post Converter
description: Python script that translates technical pull requests into user-friendly blog posts.

title: Blog Publisher
description: Automated script to push and publish new blog posts to the website infrastructure.
